name: grant1004-claude-multi-session
description: Single-plugin marketplace for claude-multi-session — multi-session parallel coding workflow for Claude Code over claude-peers MCP (Reviewer / Worker roles, dispatch protocol, atomic + daily + pitfall log templates).

plugins.name: claude-multi-session
plugins.description: Multi-session parallel coding workflow over claude-peers MCP. /multi-session:init scaffolds a project with .claude-multi-session/ role definitions, message templates, and log templates. Bundles a PowerShell launcher (claude-peers -id <name>).
